name: Fraud + Synthetic Identity + Financial Crime Groups
description: Fraud and synthetic identity groups focus on financial theft through account takeover, identity fabrication, payment fraud, mule networks, and abuse of lending, banking, insurance, and credit systems. strategic_objectives: Steal funds through fraud and account takeover
